funnels.name: COHERENT — Two-Step Link-Suppression
funnels.mechanic: Comment COHERENT -> link-FREE DM #1 opener + public reply 'check your DMs' -> user replies -> cron (two_step.py, every 15min, in-window) sends DM #2 with the tracked Coherence Check button.
funnels.notes: The headline funnel. Link moved out of cold DM #1 (was ~20-30% delivery) into reply-gated DM #2 (~70-90%). Idempotent + capped + jittered.

funnels.name: ROOM — Founding-Seat Two-Step Link-Suppression
funnels.mechanic: Comment ROOM -> link-FREE DM #1 opener (the 'honest version' $50/mo Founding-seat pitch) + public reply -> user replies -> cron (two_step.py, every 15min, in-window) sends DM #2 with the tracked 'Reserve my Founding seat' button.
funnels.notes: Second funnel routed through the shared two_step.py multi-funnel config (funnel id 'room', seg=room). Zernio automation 6a46e05af48898fb750519e4, brand account 6a2f0e515f7d1751abb350cf only, created 2026-07-02. Founding seat = $50/mo locked for life, first 100, no charge until doors open July 12. Idempotent + capped + jittered (shared caps with coherent-2step).

funnels.name: SOFT — Brianna Soft-Reset Two-Step
funnels.mechanic: Comment SOFT -> link-FREE DM #1 (persona voice, 'reply YES') + public reply 'sent 🤍' -> user replies -> cron (two_step.py, every 15min, in-window) sends DM #2 with the tracked Soft Reset button.
funnels.notes: Created 2026-07-02 via dashboard, Bri Bri profile, account 6a2f14375f7d1751abb38592, tag ig-bri-soft. two_step funnel id 'bri-soft' (seg=bri-soft). Lead-magnet page shipped in coherencedaddy PR #93, live at /tools/soft-reset. Handoff footer links the free Coherence Check.

funnels.name: CACHÉ — Mami Look-Caché-for-Less Two-Step (EN/ES)
funnels.mechanic: Comment CACHÉ/CACHE -> link-FREE DM #1 (persona voice EN/ES, 'reply SÍ or YES') + public reply 'te lo mandé 💋' -> user replies -> cron (two_step.py, every 15min, in-window) sends DM #2 with the tracked guide button.
funnels.notes: Created 2026-07-02 via dashboard, Amber 808500 profile, account 6a2f15895f7d1751abb39208, tag ig-mami-cache. two_step funnel id 'mami-cache' (seg=mami-cache). Lead-magnet page (bilingual) shipped in coherencedaddy PR #93, live at /tools/look-cache-for-less.

funnels.name: Manual Inbox Engagement
funnels.mechanic: Read comments/threads, then public reply / private-reply DM (with buttons) / hide / like — human-in-the-loop, dry-by-default.
funnels.notes: Tool, not a standing funnel. Every write --live-gated. Use sparingly on the 28k.

funnels.name: First-Comment CTA Seeding
funnels.mechanic: Drop the keyword CTA (and niche hashtags) as comment #1 at publish so every post has a clean on-ramp; keep links out of the caption.
funnels.notes: Capability built + threaded into payload builders; not yet used systematically. IG can't PIN via API (manual).

funnels.name: Story-Reply Keyword Trigger
funnels.mechanic: Story CTA 'Reply READY' -> the reply opens the 24h window itself -> instant DM with link. Stronger opt-in than a comment.
funnels.notes: One-field clone of the live automation. Cheapest new surface we own. Keep keyword-gated.

funnels.name: Segmented Multi-Keyword Self-Routing
funnels.mechanic: One post offers 2 keywords; each fires a distinct DM + link + clickTag. Audience self-segments; per-keyword CTR data.
funnels.notes: Start with exactly 2 keywords. Vary/drop commentReply to avoid the auto-comment-similarity flag.

funnels.name: Clean-Caption + Pinned-Comment Stack
funnels.mechanic: Strip URLs from captions, end on the keyword CTA, seed keyword via firstComment, pin a brand comment as backup on-ramp.
funnels.notes: Pure hygiene wrapper around the funnel. Girls: clean-caption only, no keyword.

funnels.name: Off-Platform Scored Assessment
funnels.mechanic: DM #2 carries link to a 12-18Q scored assessment; email unlocks per-pillar score + named weakness -> segues to offer.
funnels.notes: Highest revenue ceiling. Brand-only (girls have no framework to score). Needs web work on the tool.

funnels.name: Message-Design Levers (Brevity / Name / One-Ask / Jitter)
funnels.mechanic: <50-word DMs, first-name token, exactly ONE button/keyword, randomized send jitter + caps (bot-fingerprint avoidance).
funnels.notes: Partially live: jitter+caps in two_step.py, brevity+one-ask in copy. PENDING: verify + add first-name merge token.

funnels.name: In-DM Branching Quiz
funnels.mechanic: 3-question branching quiz INSIDE DMs (quick-reply buttons) -> archetype result -> native email capture.
funnels.notes: Needs the Workflows graph (quick_reply/condition/wait_for_reply/set_field). Verify comment-automation can invoke a Workflow. Cut for girls.

funnels.name: Human-Takeover Handoff
funnels.mechanic: Auto opener (DM 1-2) -> a code-only watcher pattern-matches intent (price/refund kw or clickTag click) -> Slack/Telegram ping -> Mark types from there (legit HUMAN_AGENT window).
funnels.notes: Cut for girls (no human closer). Routing is deterministic code, not an LLM.

funnels.name: Question-Sticker Story Branch
funnels.mechanic: Story question sticker 'What's your #1 block?' -> story_reply matchMode:contains branches (discipline/focus/presence) -> distinct DM + tool + clickTag per branch.
funnels.notes: Use the QUESTION sticker (typed reply fires the webhook). Poll/quiz/slider taps do NOT open the window in 2026.

funnels.name: Tiered Ghost-Recovery (one in-window touch)
funnels.mechanic: On inbound DM, send value + wait_for_reply (timeout < 24h); the silent edge fires ONE graceful re-touch with the link; reply edge exits.
funnels.notes: ONE in-window touch only. Drop the day-2/7 steps (out-of-window = violation).

funnels.name: High-Ticket Budget-Gate -> Application
funnels.mechanic: One automated DM + button -> application form that states price + asks 8 qs (budget gate + commitment). Mark DMs qualified leads a Calendly.
funnels.notes: Premature — needs a paid 1:1 offer to exist. Automate only message #1; the rest is human. Cut for girls.

funnels.name: Girls Soft Keyword Split
funnels.mechanic: Soft, platform-safe keyword splits -> DM link-in-bio variants. Never a buy/explicit axis. AI-disclosed.
funnels.notes: Blocked: girls' IG accounts not yet connected to Zernio (Remy/Solène). Lower leverage than brand.

funnels.name: Multi-Day DM Drip
funnels.mechanic: M3/M4/M5 promo DMs at 48h/4-5d/7d.
funnels.notes: Out-of-window promo = policy violation; IG DM has no opted-in-list equivalent. Multi-day nurture belongs in email/SMS off the clickTag audience.

funnels.name: Broadcast to Comment List
funnels.mechanic: Collect commenters and blast them later.
funnels.notes: Top 2026 ban trigger. No safe primitive. Do not build.

funnels.name: Public Auto-Reply Rotation
funnels.mechanic: Randomize/rotate public comment replies to dodge similarity detection.
funnels.notes: Recreates exactly the evasion IG now catches. Keep commentReply a single low-volume string.

funnels.name: Qualification-Gate Multi-Message Loop
funnels.mechanic: Multi-message automated back-and-forth qualification before any human.
funnels.notes: Automation-at-scale risk on the 28k. The safe version is one opener + reply-gated DM #2 (already live).

funnels.name: Girls Paid-Platform Monetization Tail
funnels.mechanic: SFW teaser -> destination-masking -> paid AI-chat platform.
funnels.notes: Destination-masking + paid AI chat = policy risk. Keep only the front-half traffic-driver for the girls.
